title: After Attacks in Iran, Cubans Worry They Might Be Trump’s Next Target
summary_full: Many Cubans are wondering if the Trump administration plans to target their country’s Communist government next.
summary_public: Many Cubans are wondering if the Trump administration plans to target their country’s Communist government next.
